variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Maps code to 0..vref instead of the required bipolar small-swing range.
Swaps MSB/LSB weights so endpoint and intermediate codes decode incorrectly.
Uses a threshold above the stimulus high level so all input bits are missed.
DAC4bit Small Swing: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
